name: HawkSoft Insurance Agency Management API
what_it_does: HawkSoft REST API for independent insurance agency management system (AMS). Enables AI agents to manage client and policy records, retrieve policy renewal and expiration data, access commission and premium data, handle customer communication and activity logging, manage document and attachment workflows, integrate with insurance carrier systems and rating engines, retrieve agency analytics and book of business data, and connect AMS data with accounting and CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing client and policy records from insurance agency management agents
Tracking policy renewals and expiration dates from renewal management agents
Accessing commission and revenue data from agency analytics agents
Integrating with carrier systems for policy updates from data sync agents
not_for: Captive insurance agencies without independent agent workflows
Life and health insurance without P&C policy management focus
Insurance carriers without agent-side AMS workflow
best_when: An independent property and casualty insurance agency using HawkSoft wants AI agents to automate renewal tracking, client communication, policy management, and agency analytics.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Insurance policy data includes personal financial and property information. Client coverage and claims data is sensitive. Premium and commission data is confidential business information.

auth.notes: HawkSoft uses API key authentication. Agency-level credentials. No granular scope control. Open API available for third-party integrations. Limited public developer documentation. Strong independent agency focus.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — insurance AMS subscription
pricing.notes: Corvallis, Oregon. Founded 1995. Independent insurance agency AMS. Focus on P&C independent agents. Strong alternative to Applied Epic and AMS360 for smaller independent agencies. HawkLink open API platform. Competes with Agency Zoom and AMS360 for independent agency market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Insurance policy and client financial data — sensitive business information
No public MCP server — API key with limited scope control
No webhooks — polling required for policy and client updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full agency data access
P&C focus — life and health policy data patterns differ from P&C
HawkLink platform provides open API access — partner registration required
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance policy and client financial data. SOC2. API key only. US data residency. No granular scope control.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance policy and client data. SOC2. API key only. US data residency. Limited scope control.
